events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Since the submittal is missing the panelboard's product listing page and the project note — the two items that would confirm whether the crew's proposed makeup shortcut is actually permitted by the panel's listing — the correct call is `needs_more_info` rather than an outright pass or fail: listed equipment (NEC 408, 110.3(B)) can only be used per its listing, and that can't be verified without the missing documents. Work that doesn't depend on the shortcut (rough-in, grounding electrode conductor, clearance layout, labeling) can continue; the shortcut itself and final panel closeout should be held pending the listing page, project note, and confirmation against 200.4 (neutral handling) and 110.26 (working clearance).
